nredisstack_sync.signature: StreamAdd(RedisKey key, RedisValue streamField, RedisValue streamValue, RedisValue? messageId, int? maxLength, bool useApproximateMaxLength, CommandFlags flags)

params.name: key
params.description: The key of the stream.

params.name: messageId
params.description: The ID to assign to the stream entry, defaults to an auto-generated ID ("*").

params.name: maxLength
params.description: The maximum length of the stream.

params.name: useApproximateMaxLength
params.description: If true, the "~" argument is used to allow the stream to exceed max length by a small number. This improves performance when removing messages.

params.name: flags
params.description: The flags to use for this operation.

returns.description: The ID of the newly created message.

nredisstack_sync.signature: StreamAdd(RedisKey key, NameValueEntry[] streamPairs, RedisValue? messageId, int? maxLength, bool useApproximateMaxLength, CommandFlags flags)

params.name: key
params.description: The key of the stream.

params.name: streamPairs
params.description: The fields and their associated values to set in the stream entry.

params.name: messageId
params.description: The ID to assign to the stream entry, defaults to an auto-generated ID ("*").

params.name: maxLength
params.description: The maximum length of the stream.

params.name: useApproximateMaxLength
params.description: If true, the "~" argument is used to allow the stream to exceed max length by a small number. This improves performance when removing messages.

params.name: flags
params.description: The flags to use for this operation.

returns.description: The ID of the newly created message.

nredisstack_sync.signature: StreamAdd(RedisKey key, RedisValue streamField, RedisValue streamValue, RedisValue? messageId = null, long? maxLength = null, bool useApproximateMaxLength = false, long? limit = null, StreamTrimMode trimMode = StreamTrimMode.KeepReferences, CommandFlags flags = CommandFlags.None)

params.name: key
params.description: The key of the stream.

params.name: messageId
params.description: The ID to assign to the stream entry, defaults to an auto-generated ID ("*").

params.name: maxLength
params.description: The maximum length of the stream.

params.name: useApproximateMaxLength
params.description: If true, the "~" argument is used to allow the stream to exceed max length by a small number. This improves performance when removing messages.

params.name: limit
params.description: Specifies the maximal count of entries that will be evicted.

params.name: trimMode
params.description: Determines how stream trimming should be performed.

params.name: flags
params.description: The flags to use for this operation.

returns.description: The ID of the newly created message.

redis_rb.signature: xadd(key, entry, approximate: nil, maxlen: nil, minid: nil, nomkstream: nil, id: '*')

params.name: key
params.description: the stream key

params.name: entry
params.description: one or multiple field-value pairs

params.name: approximate
params.description: whether to add ~ modifier of maxlen/minid or not

params.name: maxlen
params.description: max length of entries to keep

params.name: minid
params.description: min id of entries to keep

params.name: nomkstream
params.description: whether to add NOMKSTREAM

params.name: id
params.description: the entry id, default value is *

returns.description: the entry id
